main.name: Beginner
main.description: You have now officially started your Geometry Dash grind! By beating 13 Easy Demons you are well prepared to continue down the list!

main.name: Bronze
main.description: Entering Medium Demon territory. Things are getting a bit harder, and more focus is required. Beat 12 Medium Demons to achieve this rank!

main.name: Silver
main.description: The Silver tier introduces you to more visibly confusing levels, with a lot of flashing decoration and fake structures. This will definitely come in handy later on!

main.name: Gold
main.description: Timings are getting tougher, spaces become tighter, but you pushed through! You are now ready to take on the higher end Insane Demons, GL!

main.name: Amber
main.description: Like Gold, Insane Demons, but much harder >:D Get this, and you will be well prepared for the Extreme Demons!

main.name: Platinum
main.description: Welcome to the Extreme Demon club! This rank is quite a lot above the average GD player and you should feel super proud of yourself. GG.

main.name: Sapphire
main.description: This is where things really start to step up in difficulty. Beat 7 of the levels to achieve the Sapphire rank, and earn bragging rights to your friends c:

main.name: Jade
main.description: This tier shows just how far you have gone, how far you can go, and how well you have done. Congrats and carry on!

main.name: Emerald
main.description: This is not an easy feat. You are now getting used to longer levels, crammed with timings and hard sections! Great Job.

main.name: Ruby
main.description: You have now passed some of the old legendary levels in this game. You show true perseverance and strength!

main.name: Diamond
main.description: At this point, you are ready for everything. Not a lot of players have the skill or patience to go for this.

main.name: Pearl
main.description: You have defeated many modern classics, pushing through barriers once considered impossible. Continue climbing your way to the top.

main.name: Onyx
main.description: You are now among the top players. This is a great time to thank all your friends and family.

main.name: Amethyst
main.description: You have now proved the impossible. Your skill is unmatched!

bonus.name: 12 Demons of Christmas (2025)
bonus.description: 12 Demons leading up to Christmas, each picked by a different staff member!

bonus.name: 12 Demons of Christmas (2024)
bonus.description: We introduce you to 12 Demons of Christmas 2024 Edition!! Following the same rules as the previous 12DoC packs, each day one level chosen by individual List Managers will be revealed until Christmas!

bonus.name: 12 Demons of Christmas (2023)
bonus.description: Each day a new level picked by members of the List Team

bonus.name: Minigame Pack
bonus.description: A pack of minigames.

bonus.name: GD10
bonus.description: A celebration of Geometry Dash's 10 year anniversary that includes one popular Demon from each year (2013-2023).

bonus.name: 12 Demons of Christmas (2022)
bonus.description: Merry Christmas everyone! Each level is chosen by one of our 12 total staff members, and will be released one level at a time, once a day for the 12 days leading up to Christmas.

bonus.name: Nine Circles Pack
bonus.description: Levels inspired by the well known Zobros level.

bonus.name: Memory Novice
bonus.description: A stepping stone into more difficult memory demons, with levels varying in updates and styles. These levels will help players get used to memory with varying degrees of learning difficulty and different kinds of memory gameplay.

bonus.name: Memory Expert
bonus.description: The next step into harder memory demons. This pack includes levels with difficult timings, duals, and other gamemodes alongside memory gameplay.

bonus.name: Memory Master
bonus.description: This pack contains 8 of the toughest memory demons in the game!

bonus.name: 2P Solo Pack
bonus.description: You better get your brain in gear, because these demons require you to use both hands! Intended for solo completion.

bonus.name: Invisible Pack
bonus.description: Geometry Dash, as you've never seen it before. Beat these 5 invisible demons to get the rank!

bonus.name: 1.9 GDPS Pack
bonus.description: A true classic never goes out of style, this pack contains 5 levels made in 2.1 with 1.9 limitations.

bonus.name: XXL
bonus.description: These levels are long, very very long. Beat the 5 longest rated levels in the game (at the time of the pack's release) to get this rank!

bonus.name: The Speedrun Pack
bonus.description: Beat the 5 shortest demons in the game (at the time of the pack's release) to get this rank!

bonus.name: The Trusta Pack
bonus.description: In order to get this rank you have to beat all full levels on Trusta's account. And subscribe to Trusta's YouTube channel :)

bonus.name: The Temple Series
bonus.description: The legendary footprint of Michigun. Beat all of his temple levels to get this rank!

bonus.name: The Coder Pack
bonus.description: A pack by ElohmroW containing his levels along with some of his favorites

bonus.name: Kria Pack
bonus.description: A pack containing the 2 co-owner's favorite levels. #Kria (Krtar and Lia)

bonus.name: The Aeon Air Pack
bonus.description: Beat all of Aeon's rated Demon levels and subscribe to his YouTube channel :)

bonus.name: GDDL 1
bonus.description: These 2 packs are a thank you to the Geometry Dash Demon Ladder for making a pack for the GDDP! 1 level from each of their "Reference Tiers" (at the time of the pack's release) up to tier 20 is what this pack contains.

bonus.name: GDDL 2
bonus.description: These 2 packs are a thank you to the Geometry Dash Demon Ladder for making a pack for the GDDP! 1 level from each of their "Reference Tiers" (at the time of the pack's release) up to tier 20 is what this pack contains.

bonus.name: The Apocalyptic Trilogy
bonus.description: Red hell themed extremes are the best! Beat Cataclysm, Bloodbath and Aftermath.

bonus.name: The Plasma Pack
bonus.description: Beat the 4 Plasma Pulse to get this rank!

bonus.name: RGB
bonus.description: In order to achieve this rank you need to beat Yatagarasu, Erebus and Sonic Wave. The old legendary RGB.

bonus.name: The Sonic Series
bonus.description: Beat the entire Sonic series to get this rank!

bonus.name: The Lightwave Pack
bonus.description: Infrared, Ultraviolet, Gammaray and.... Microwave? Beat the first 3 mentioned :D

bonus.name: Sonic Wave Series
bonus.description: You must really like sonic wave if you want this rank. Beat all rated Sonic Wave remakes!

monthly.name: The Biome Pack
monthly.description: O'er the hills, and far away, lying down upon the earth. Biomes o' Plenty for those to explore. March 2026

monthly.name: Interstellar Pack
monthly.description: The critically acclaimed 2014 Sci-Fi movie (GDDP Monthly Pack for February 2026)

monthly.name: Balls Pack
monthly.description: We balling. (GDDP Monthly Pack for January 2026)

monthly.name: The Winter Pack
monthly.description: Grab some hot cocoa, snuggle under the covers, and play some GD classics. :) (GDDP Monthly Pack for December 2025)

monthly.name: Supermarket Pack
monthly.description: Attention shoppers! This is the Supermarket Pack! (GDDP Monthly Pack for November 2025)

monthly.name: The Monster Pack
monthly.description: The monsters have emerged. (GDDP Monthly Pack for October 2025)

monthly.name: The Avian Pack
monthly.description: Quack quack quack (duck all of you tbh) (GDDP Monthly Pack for September 2025)

monthly.name: The Strategy Pack
monthly.description: Many branches, one end result. How you get there is up to you. (GDDP Monthly Pack for August 2025)

monthly.name: Mathematics Pack
monthly.description: Welcome back to summer school! Your final test is to beat this pack. :) (GDDP Monthly Pack for July 2025)

monthly.name: The Confession Pack
monthly.description: It's pride month yet again! Here's a story of gay love that probably relates to someone out there. (GDDP Monthly Pack for June 2025)

monthly.name: The Supreme Intelligence Pack
monthly.description: it's maymory we will force you to beat memory demons again OKAY THANKS BYE (GDDP Monthly Pack for May 2025)

monthly.name: Red Herring Pack
monthly.description: You'd be a fool if you think this is another Staff Pack. (GDDP Monthly Pack for April 2025)

monthly.name: Video Game Pack
monthly.description: GD is a little boring, so here are six other games for you to play instead :) (GDDP Monthly Pack for March 2025)

monthly.name: Achromatic Pack
monthly.description: It's time. To go back to the past. Samurai Jack. Let's see if you can handle the Achromatic Pack!! (GDDP Monthly Pack for February 2025)

monthly.name: Dream Pack
monthly.description: Sweet dreams are made of this... (GDDP Monthly Pack for January 2025)

monthly.name: The Snowy Pack
monthly.description: As Winter draws in, the weather turns cold and snowy. (GDDP Monthly Pack for December 2024)

monthly.name: American Thanksgiving Pack
monthly.description: All of these levels were chosen due to their relation with food one would find in the FDA's manual chapter labeled "Avoid" (GDDP Monthly Pack for November 2024)

monthly.name: Unsettling Pack
monthly.description: All of these levels are creepy, off-putting, and/or unsettling in some form. Also don't look out your window. (GDDP Monthly Pack for October 2024)

monthly.name: Username Pack
monthly.description: All of these levels have a player's username in their title! (GDDP Monthly Pack for September 2024)

monthly.name: Ocean Pack
monthly.description: AHOY!! SUPRRISE ATTACK! We present to you the Ocean Pack! Splish Splash I was takin a bath (GDDP Monthly Pack for August 2024)

monthly.name: Roller Coaster Pack
monthly.description: Every level shares the name of an existing roller coaster. Weeeeeeeeee (GDDP Monthly Pack for July 2024)

monthly.name: Outdoors Pack
monthly.description: Go on, touch it :) (GDDP Monthly Pack for June 2024)

monthly.name: Car Crash Pack
monthly.description: This pack was designed to perfectly represent the stages of a car crash. Remember to wear your seatbelt!!! (GDDP Monthly Pack for May 2024)

monthly.name: Silly Pack
monthly.description: We present to you the Silly Pack! (GDDP Monthly Pack for April 2024)

monthly.name: Industrial Pack
monthly.description: We present to you the Industrial Pack! (GDDP Monthly Pack for March 2024)

unknown.description: This skill does not have a description.

overall.description: This level helps improve your overall skill level.

cube.description: This level contains significant Cube gameplay.

ship.description: This level contains significant Ship gameplay.

ball.description: This level contains significant Ball gameplay.

ufo.description: This level contains significant UFO gameplay.

wave.description: This level contains significant Wave gameplay.

robot.description: This level contains significant Robot gameplay.

spider.description: This level contains significant Spider gameplay.

swing.description: This level contains significant Swing gameplay.

swing-legacy.description: This level contains significant Swingcopter gameplay. This involves the Dual Ball setup using Blue Orbs as opposed to the 2.2 Swing gamemode.

duals.description: This level contains significant Dual parts. Dual gamemode is the best gamemode.

speed-changes.description: This level contains lots of Speed Changes.

nerve-control.description: This level helps with improving nerve control. Don't choke!

memory.description: This level has a lot of Memory sections in it. Remember to FOCUS.

fast-paced.description: This level goes very, very fast. Slow down and learn the patterns.

gm-changes.description: This level tends to switch Gamemodes fast and often.

timings.description: This level helps you improve your overall Timing. Keep it up and you'll reach your Final Destination.

learny.description: This level requires a bit more effort to learn. Keep practicing and you'll get it soon!

flow.description: This level helps you improve on Flow gameplay. Just go with the flow!

moving-gp.description: This level contains some Moving Gameplay. You may have to memorize the movement patterns.

high-cps.description: This level contains sections that require High CPS (Clicks Per Second).

2p.description: This level has 2 Player Mode enabled for Dual sections.

chokepoints.description: This level may have places where you can commonly mess up. Practice these sections thoroughly!

awkward.description: This level has some unconventional or awkward gameplay in it.

plat-momentum.description:
This level utilizes momentum mechanics.

(Platformer Only)

sp-best-level.description: TrusTa gave "hell and heaven" this award.

sp-spam.description: I hope you have your warranty still.

sp-unique.description: This level has very interesting and gimmicky gameplay.
